description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on every pull request to the develop branch. The workflow should have two jobs: build_windows_msvc and build_windows_clang. The build_windows_msvc job runs on windows-latest, sets up MPI, installs Python dependencies, checks out the repository with submodules, and builds and tests the project with MSVC and Python. The build_windows_clang job runs on windows-2019, installs Python dependencies, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Ninja, and builds and tests the project with Clang and Debug configuration.
